data.title: Huawei supports ASEAN's zero-carbon goal at AEBF-25 in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, with advanced grid forming tech.
data.description: The ASEAN Energy Business Forum (AEBF-25) took place in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia from October 15 to 17, 2025. The event, themed "Powering ASEAN: Bridging Boundaries, Building Prosperity," concentrated on regional energy interconnection and clean energy solutions. The forum attracted a significant number of participants, with over 500 industry experts, policymakers, and stakeholders attending. Key discussions revolved around fostering collaboration in the ASEAN energy sector to achieve sustainable growth and prosperity.

data.title: Natural Grocers hosting a "Spooktacular" Halloween event on Oct. 25, 2025, from 11 a.m. - 1 p.m., at participating locations.
data.description: A family-friendly event called "Spooktacular" is being hosted by Natural Grocers®, the largest family-operated organic and natural grocery retailer in the United States. It will take place on Saturday, Oct. 25, 2025, from 11 a.m. to 1 p.m. at selected locations.

data.title: Manar Abu Dhabi's second edition artist line-up announced by DCT Abu Dhabi, celebrating creativity.
data.description: Taking place in Abu Dhabi, UAE on October 17, 2025, Manar Abu Dhabi is a public light art exhibition managed by the Department of Culture and Tourism. The event aims to promote creativity and showcase the varied landscapes of the emirate. This year marks the second edition of Manar, indicating its growing popularity and success.

data.title: AI sector analysts predict a $8 trillion opportunity, asserting sustainable growth despite concerns of a bubble.
data.description: Wall Street analysts believe there is no bubble in the AI sector and project a significant growth opportunity. The industry's sustainable growth could unlock an $8 trillion opportunity, with expected total revenue ranging from $5 trillion to $19 trillion according to analysts from Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, and Wedbush Securities. They believe that the current AI investment levels are sustainable and that effective deployment of AI could generate productivity gains exceeding investments. The JPMorgan team led by Samik Chatterjee predicts a significant increase in AI-related capital expenditures this year. The analysts also highlighted that while investment levels are sustainable, the ultimate winners in the AI sector are not yet clear.

data.title: Canada Goose to report Q2 FY 2026 results on November 6, 2025; ended Sept 28, 2025. Conference call at 8:30am ET.
data.description: Canada Goose Holdings Inc. intends to reveal its performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 on November 6, 2025. The quarter ended on September 28, 2025. The results will be announced before the market opens, with a conference call and webcast scheduled for 8:30am ET on the same day. Investors can access a live webcast of the call on the company’s website at http://investor.canadagoose.com. Canada Goose Holdings Inc. is listed on both the NYSE and TSX under the ticker symbol GOOS.
